items.title: South African opposition figure Malema sentenced to five years in prison
items.dek: Malema is appealing against the decision to prevent him from being taken to prison on Thursday.
items.body: Malema is appealing against the decision to prevent him from being taken to prison on Thursday.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Turkish police order 83 arrests over online praise for school shootings
items.dek: At least nine were killed in a school shooting in southern Turkey on Wednesday, a day after another attack injured 16 people at a high school.
items.body: At least nine were killed in a school shooting in southern Turkey on Wednesday, a day after another attack injured 16 people at a high school.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Meghan says she was 'most trolled person in the world'
items.dek: Alongside her husband, the Duchess of Sussex was speaking to young people in Melbourne about the harms of social media.
items.body: Alongside her husband, the Duchess of Sussex was speaking to young people in Melbourne about the harms of social media.
items.author: IriLine Desk
